outlook_paragraph: Occidental's drilling activity as of July 2024 shows only one active site, with no newly activated pads and a 50% decline in relative activity compared to recent trends, indicating reduced operational momentum heading into the June 2024 quarter. Despite a moderately strong WTI environment averaging $81.28 and a realized price at a 6% discount, the company's limited active footprint—representing just 30% of its production base—suggests constrained volume growth. The deterministic revenue forecast of $6.66B reflects this subdued drilling signal, anchored near consensus but adjusted downward due to weak satellite-derived activity.
